title: Branding the home Page with our company logo vs the "Monday Sales CRM" logo
excerpt: We like the Monday Sales CRM but don’t want it to say “Sales CRM” on the home screen at the top left corner.  We are a non-profit and our agents use the Monday app on iPads to enter in client’s info in person and we don’…

posts.author: Kenzo (Eric Nelson)
posts.cookedHtml: We like the Monday Sales CRM but don’t want it to say “Sales CRM” on the home screen at the top left corner. We are a non-profit and our agents use the Monday app on iPads to enter in client’s info in person and we don’t want the clients to see “Sales CRM” since we aren’t selling anything and we don’t want clients to think that. Instead, if we could add our logo for branding purposes. You could perhaps add “powered by monday” or something by our branded logo?
